title: Opcode sequence lookup
description: Find similar matched and unmatched functions by live opcode-sequence indexes generated from build/GALE01/asm, with deterministic fingerprint and neighbor evidence plus report-based function-shape fallback rows.
status_message: Live runner v2: opcode sequences, fingerprints, and neighbors are generated locally from build/GALE01/asm by toolpacks/gamecube-decomp/research/opseq/runners/extract_opcode_sequences.py.
limitations: Opcode fingerprints come from generated assembly artifacts; rerun the runner after rebuilding asm/report outputs.
Precomputed neighbors use deterministic opcode n-gram, histogram, length, prefix, and exact-sequence score components; they are not a full edit-distance engine.

usage.agent_guidance: Use before inventing a source shape when similar opcode or function-shape evidence could point to a local analog.
